# Postcove

> Postcove is a free, open-source (AGPL-3.0), privacy-first app that scans, summarizes and organizes German postal mail — Finanzamt notices, insurance, contracts, utility bills — entirely on the user's device. No account, no cloud, GDPR-friendly. Users bring their own AI API key (Google Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and more); documents are sent directly from the device to the chosen provider and never through any Postcove server.

Postcove helps residents and expats in Germany cope with overwhelming bureaucratic mail ("Beamtendeutsch"). You photograph a letter, an AI model reads and classifies it, and the app files it into an automatically-created category, extracts a plain-language summary, and tracks any deadlines (Fristen).

Key facts:
- Platform: Web app (Nuxt 4 SPA) + native iOS/Android via Capacitor.
- Privacy: 100% on-device. No backend, no accounts, no tracking. Data lives only in the browser/device storage.
- Cost: Free and open-source software, licensed AGPL-3.0-or-later.
- Languages: English and German.
- AI: Bring-Your-Own-Key. Supported providers include Google Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, xAI Grok, OpenRouter, Together AI, Groq, Hugging Face, Fireworks AI, DeepInfra, Mistral, and Ollama (local).
- Categories: Created dynamically from AI classification (e.g. Finanzamt, Versicherung, Verträge, Energie & Wohnen) and fully user-manageable (add, move, copy, delete).

## Documentation
- [Source code & README](https://github.com/your-org/postcove): full project documentation, setup, and architecture.
- [Full description for LLMs](https://postcove.app/llms-full.txt): expanded details about features, stack, and usage.

## Use cases
- "App to organize German mail / Finanzamt letters with AI"
- "Privacy-first offline document scanner with bring-your-own AI key"
- "Open-source local-first mailbox app for Germany (EN/DE)"
